sentence: All up, our AI business is on track to surpass an annual revenue run rate of $10 billion next quarter, which will make it the fastest business in our history to reach this milestone.
notes: stated as on-track for next quarter

sentence: And our AI business has now surpassed an annual revenue run rate of $13 billion up 175% year-over-year.
Our AI business surpassed $37 billion ARR, up 123%.
In the first 3 years of this AI wave, AWS' AI revenue run rate is over $15 billion, nearly 260x larger.
notes: AWS AI-specific; 3 years into AI wave

sentence: If you combine Traneum and Graviton, it's well over a $10 billion annualized run rate business it's still very early there so I'm very optimistic about what we're seeing, know, the Project Rainier has gone very well.
notes: custom silicon (Trainium+Graviton) run rate; transcript spelling artifact

sentence: AWS revenue grew 12% year-over-year in Q3, with $919 million of incremental quarter-over-quarter revenue and now has the annualized revenue run rate of $92 billion.
AWS now has an annualized revenue run rate of $115 billion.
We added $2.6 billion in quarter over quarter revenue and AWS now has an annualized revenue run rate of $142 billion.
AWS is now a $150 billion annualized revenue run rate business.
In AI alone, we signed contracts with 30 different customers for $12.5 billion in new AI business.
notes: new AI contracts signed, FY2024 Q4

sentence: Well, Anthropic recently reported that its annualized run rate revenue has reached $7 billion as of last month, up from $1 billion at the start of the year.
notes: NVIDIA management citing Anthropic's reported ARR; up from $1bn at start of year

sentence: As we continue on our hyper-growth trajectory, we expect to exit 2026 with annualized run rate revenue of $17 billion to $19 billion, which we expect to grow to more than $30 billion of annualized run rate revenue as we exit 2027.
We now expect to end 2026 with $18 billion to $19 billion of annualized run rate revenue, increasing the low end of our expectations by $1 billion.

We continue to expect to grow annualized run rate revenue to more than $30 billion as we exit 2027 more than 75% of which is already contracted, excluding any benefit from not-yet-exercised customer renewals.
Annualized run rate revenue for our Nebius AI business reached $1.9 billion at the end of March, up over 50% from $1.25 billion in the previous quarter.

As such, we are reiterating our full year 2026 guidance for annualized run rate revenue of $7 billion to $9 billion, group revenue of between $3 billion and $3.4 billion and group adjusted EBITDA margin of around 40%.
Based on the strength of demand that we see and our accelerated capacity growth plan, we believe we can achieve annualized run rate revenue (ARR) of $7 to $9 billion by the end of 2026.

Today, we have approximately $2.3 billion of annualized revenue run rate under contract, including around $0.4 billion at Prince George which we expect to increase over the coming weeks as we finalize negotiations for the remaining capacity there.
We increased ARR under contract to $3.1 billion, remain on track to hit $3.7 billion exiting calendar 2026.
Turning to our data center AI business, we delivered our third straight quarter of record data center GPU revenue with MI300 quarterly revenue exceeding $1 billion for the first time.
notes: quarterly >$1bn annualized ~4bn; EXCLUDED from Vp (consolidation rule) - context only
